overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed video game showing a cowboy character running through a desert canyon environment with towering red rock formations and sparse vegetation under clear midday skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert canyon trail along cliff base

agents.ego_description: running steadily along the base of a towering red rock cliff wall

entered.detail: steep reddish-brown cliff face towering immediately beside the path
layered red rock formations visible across the canyon in the hazy distance
small stones and debris along the edge of the dirt trail

segments.scene_description: The character runs along a narrow dirt trail hugging the base of a massive red rock cliff. The canyon stretches out ahead with distant rock formations visible through the haze, while scattered stones line the path edges.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert trail passing large rock outcrop

events.description: large boulder comes into view on the right side of the trail as the path widens slightly

agents.ego_description: continuing to run while navigating past a prominent boulder formation on the right side of the path

entered.detail: prominent gray rock outcrop beside the trail casting a dark shadow

segments.scene_description: The trail opens slightly as the character approaches and passes a large boulder on the right. The cliff wall remains on the left but recedes to mid-distance, while the character runs alongside the rock formation before moving past it.

scene_state.functional_zone: open canyon trail with expansive overlook

events.description: trail opens to reveal expansive canyon views as the boulder is left behind

agents.ego_description: running along the canyon edge with expansive views of the desert landscape ahead

entered.detail: steep drop-off revealing lower canyon terrain and distant desert floor

segments.scene_description: Having passed the boulder, the trail opens into a wide overlook with expansive views of the canyon below. The cliff wall now sits far to the left while the path continues along the edge of the desert plateau.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a desert trail that transforms from a confined canyon corridor into an expansive plateau overlook. It begins with the character running along a narrow dirt path hugging the base of a massive red rock cliff, with distant formations shimmering through a light haze. As the character advances, the trail opens slightly to pass a large boulder on the right, causing the towering cliff wall on the left to recede into the mid-distance. The scene then expands as the path clears the boulder, shifting from the enclosed canyon floor to a wide overlook. Finally, the camera reveals a vast vista of the canyon below while the character continues along the edge of the desert plateau.
